verifyOwnership.title: Verify Property Ownership
verifyOwnership.description: Verify property ownership using Haryana land records (Jamabandi). Enter the Tehsil, Village, and Khasra Number to look up the official record.
verifyOwnership.important: Important: You must solve the CAPTCHA yourself. We do not bypass security mechanisms of the Haryana Jamabandi portal.
verifyOwnership.clickLoadCaptcha: Click "Load CAPTCHA" to get a CAPTCHA image
verifyOwnership.captchaFailed: Failed to load CAPTCHA. Please try again.
verifyOwnership.captchaIncorrect: CAPTCHA was incorrect. Please refresh and try again.
verifyOwnership.notFound: No land record found for the given Tehsil, Village, and Khasra Number.
verifyOwnership.genericError: Unable to fetch land records at this time. Please try again later.
verifyOwnership.dataSourced: Data sourced from the Haryana Jamabandi portal. Always verify with official records before making property decisions.
verifyOwnership.fillForm: Fill in the form and submit to view land ownership details.

aboutJamabandi.title: About Jamabandi Land Records
aboutJamabandi.description: Jamabandi is the official land record maintained by the Revenue Department of Haryana. It contains details of ownership, cultivation rights, and encumbrances on agricultural and non-agricultural land parcels identified by Khasra numbers.
tips: Verify ownership before buying a plot or agricultural land
Check for any pending litigations or encumbrances
Confirm mutation (intkal) has been completed after purchase
Official data is periodically updated by Patwaris

zoneChecker.description: Browse land use zones, Floor Area Ratio (FAR), and height restrictions for Gurugram sectors as per the Haryana Master Plan.
zoneChecker.error: Zoning data temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
zoneChecker.farCalcDesc: Estimate the maximum buildable area from your plot size and the applicable Floor Area Ratio (FAR).
zoneChecker.colonyApprovalsDesc: Licensed colonies in Gurugram with their approval status.

detail.notFoundDesc: We could not find zoning data for this sector.
detail.error: Zoning data temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
detail.zoningData: Gurugram, Haryana — Zoning data as per Haryana Master Plan
detail.farExplanation: Floor Area Ratio (FAR), also called Floor Space Index (FSI), is the ratio of a building's total floor area to the size of the plot on which it is built.
detail.farExample: For example, a FAR of 2.0 on a 200 sq m plot allows a maximum built-up floor area of 400 sq m across all floors.
farTips: FAR limits are set by the Master Plan authority (DTCP Haryana)
Violation of FAR can result in demolition notices
Always verify with the local municipal authority before construction
detail.dataSourced: Data sourced from DTCP Haryana and the Gurugram Master Plan. For official verification, consult DTCP or the local urban local body.
